_comment: Research topic watchlist for research_producer.py. Each topic is checked against the knowledge base; if no article exists within interval_days, a dispatcher task is injected.

_schema.slug: unique stable key -- used for dedup routine_id and output path (memory/work/{slug}/)
_schema.title: human-readable description passed to /research as the topic
_schema.type: technical | market | live -- passed as --type flag, skips interactive classification
_schema.domain: knowledge base domain (ai-infra | fintech | crypto | security | general)
_schema.depth: quick | default | deep -- passed as depth flag
_schema.interval_days: minimum days between research runs for this topic
_schema.priority: dispatcher priority 1-5 (lower = higher priority, research defaults to P2)
_schema.tags: keywords for knowledge index matching in prior-knowledge scan
_schema.enabled: set false to pause without deleting

topics.title: Current state of AI agent frameworks -- LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen, Agentless patterns
Claude API and Anthropic product updates -- new models, SDK changes, pricing
Fintech and banking AI adoption -- enterprise deployments, vendor landscape, consulting demand
Prediction market platforms and calibration mechanics -- Metaculus, Manifold, Polymarket
DeFi market structure, MEV, and algorithmic trading opportunities 2026
Autonomous coding agent capabilities -- Devin, SWE-agent, Claude Code, Cursor patterns
AI-specific security threats -- prompt injection, model poisoning, agentic attack surfaces
